pi_items.source: Task difficulty is an arbitrary rating assigned by the benchmark creators.
Explicitly stated in the task description and verifier.py header.
Explicitly stated in the task description and verifier.py header.
Confirmed via `passed = score >= 70` logic in verifier.py.
Confirmed by summing the maximum possible points for all conditions (C1:20 + C2:25 + C3:15 + C4:20 + C5:20 = 100) in verifier.py.
Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which strips furniture from an existing sample to generate /home/ga/Documents/SweetHome3D/convention_hall_starter.sh3d.
Confirmed by matching the features to the required elements in verifier.py (furniture_count, new_walls, new_dimensions, zone_identifiers).

privileged_info_summary: I have independently verified that the task operates on a synthetically generated building shell (convention_hall_starter.sh3d) programmatically derived from a SweetHome3D example file. The task scoring explicitly requires a pass threshold of 70 points out of a possible 100 points, derived from conditions C1-C5. I have also verified that the scoring logic directly checks for furniture placement, wall creation, dimension annotation, and label placement as claimed in the task metadata.
